titleStmt.title: SII 25.210B: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 210B. (A.R. No. 210B of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: West base of the verandah in the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

This fragmentary record may be assigned to the 13th century on palaeographical considerations. The writing on the stone in the middle of this record and the record of the 12th year of Rājēndradēva (A.R.Ep 1908, No. 210), has been erased by chiselling. Therefore, the details of the record are not known. However, from the extant portion of the record, it may be said that it refers to some lands granted by an officer for the purpose of services (tiruppaṇi) to some deity. One Eyiṉaṅjuḍaiyān is referred to as mudal-kaṇakku and also as one of the signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
— Aiñcumā mivin kiḻ Eḻu—
—kamkkoṇṭu cantirātitava—
—ṭakkuṭaṉe kūṭṭi Ēṟpperpaṭṭak—
1. This inscription is written in the stone after No. 210/1908 with a space in between, probably intanded for chiselling a record.

—caiyumttiruppaṇiyum celut—
—ṭṭi koḷḷa paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi—
—pallavaraiyan neḻuttu (7) Eṉ
—tu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai mu—
—talk kaṇakku Eyiṉaṅ kuṭaiyārn—
—kūrruṭaiyān coḻakaṅka veḷa—
Digital edition of SII 25.210B by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
